items.name: Brass Key
items.description: A heavy brass key with an ornate handle. It looks like it fits an interior door.

items.name: Torn Letter
items.description: Half of a letter. The visible text reads: '...cannot forgive what was done to the estate. If the truth is revealed...'

items.name: Magnifying Glass
items.description: A silver-handled magnifying glass. Useful for examining fine details.

items.name: Safe Combination
items.description: A slip of paper with numbers: 8-23-42. Found hidden inside a book.

items.name: Faded Photograph
items.description: A sepia photograph of two women standing before Thornwood Manor. One has been crossed out in ink.
